MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Sarah Valentine, Esq. of BURNHAM BROWN (510-835-6820), appearing for defendant / moving party Golden Gate Drywall, Inc.
Oren P. Noah, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Richard Lane

RULING:
Defendant Golden Gate Drywall, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment
Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Golden Gate Drywall, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is denied and its motion for summary adjudication is granted as to plaintiffs' claims for strict liability and false representation and denied as to the general negligence claim. The declaration of Mr. Cantley creates a triable issue whether Mr. Lane was exposed to asbestos-containing drywall accessory products attributable to defendant. Defendant's objections to Mr. Cantley's declaration are overruled. Plaintiffs concede the lack of merit to their claims for strict liability and false representation. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(220/HEK)

RULING:
